content.en:
The Bounds of the Endless Seams.

Ye Tian began to transform this realm of the rift, this transformation was mainly to prevent the peak demon seeds on the other side of the demon seed abyss from invading here, so he needed to cut off the possibility of the demon seed abyss invading here.

And the best way to transform is to arrange the super-dimensional formation and integrate the super-dimensional formation into the realm of the endless seam.

In this way, even if you don't go all out to urge the super-dimensional formation, the super-dimensional formation itself alone is enough to cut off the possibility of the peak demon seed invading here.

"Then arrange another Star Dimension Void Heaven Array!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He dismantled the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array in the Eternal Realm, although there would be some loss, but the loss was not much, and a little extra-dimensional material was enough.

Subsequently, he arranged a super-dimensional formation in the realm of the Endless Seam.

Before you know it, this extra-dimensional formation has been arranged.

Boom!! "Seven-nine-seven"!

The Star Dimension Void Heaven Array was completely integrated into this Endless Rift Realm, which increased the defense of this Endless Rift Realm many times over, and the space became more stable.

Moreover, Ye Tian also sent a replica body to guard this Star Dimension Void Heaven Array for a long time, so he was even more at ease.

"Now it's time to open a passage between the Endless Rift and the Void of Death!"

Ye Tian had already obtained such a method from the Boundary Court Headquarters, and directly opened a passage from the Endless Rift Realm, under normal circumstances, there was no way to break through the barrier between the Endless Rift Boundary and the Death Void.

However, those supreme forces continued to study and naturally found a way.

And this help is a superdimensional thing, using an ordinary low-level extradimensional thing, and then using a superdimensional secret technique called the superdimensional realm Dao technique, you can break through the barrier and form a permanent superdimensional void channel.

And the premise of this is that there is a peak realm god who has fused extra-dimensional things among the supreme forces, otherwise they would not be able to practice that super-dimensional secret art.

And the supreme forces that have just been promoted, there is a high probability that they can't do this, and they can ask the peak realm gods of other supreme forces to help arrange them.

However, Ye Tian had already fused the extra-dimensional things, so he could naturally practice the super-dimensional secret technique of this extra-dimensional realm, and there was no problem in arranging it by himself.

......

Click!!!

The walls are crumbling, and an ancient gate is condensing.

At this time, Ye Tian threw an extradimensional object into it and merged it into this ancient gate.

Gradually, the aura of extradimensional power emerged from this ancient gate, becoming more and more mysterious.

This gate is the passage into the Void of Death, and it is also the passage created by using the Extradimensional Realm Dao Technique.

"It's done!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

With this passage, he didn't need to maintain it, he could travel back and forth between the Endless Rift and the Death Void, and this passage was completely controlled by him in the Endless Rift, and the outside forces could not use this passage at all.

In the future, the peak realm gods or high-level realm gods of the human race can also use this passage to enter the Death Void.

Of course, if his strength is not good, even if he is a high-level peak realm god or a peak realm god, he will not allow these human race realm gods to enter the Death Void, otherwise he will die if he is not careful.

The following years were very peaceful, Ye Tian practiced silently, and the human race gave birth to some high-level peak realm gods one after another, but it would take a lot of time for these high-level peak realm gods to impact the peak realm gods.

Ye Tian would not give them a large amount of extradimensional resources, after all, the human race is now a supreme force, and it is not urgent to increase the number of peak realm gods, so if these high-level peak realm gods want to impact the peak realm gods, there is a high probability that they still have to rely on their own cultivation.

Time flies.

In a trance, another five trillion years have passed.

During these years, Ye Tian obtained a large amount of resources from the Death Void, as well as a lot of extradimensional things.

But one day it will be unbearable, and it will fall completely.

So.

Ye Tian will not put his relatives in danger until he has a solution.

And in these five trillion Dao Era years, his strength has not improved much, although the Eternal Dao Seed has been tempered a lot, it is a little stronger than when he just broke through to the peak realm god, but at most it has been tempered to one-tenth of the current realm.

In other words, it would probably take tens of trillions of Dao Era years for him to be able to refine the Eternal Dao Seed to his current limit. []

Cultivation cannot be broken through, and this improvement of the Eternal Dao Seed naturally cannot increase much power.

Of course, he also created some extra-dimensional techniques, and also refined a lot of super-dimensional secret treasures, which can increase a little strength in these two aspects.

"After exploring the Death Void for so long, that place needs to be visited again, and there should be hope that the resources there will be taken away. "

Ye Tian's heart moved, and he rushed there one by one to copy his body.

......

Death Void.

Red Sky Blood Golden Grass area.

Ye Tian descended here, when he entered the Death Void for the first time, he followed the boundless sailing ship of the Sumeru Realm God passing through here, and the high-level realm gods longed for the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass here, but he was instantly killed by the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass here.

However, Ye Tian always remembered this, after all, hundreds of Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, what a lot of resources this is!

"A Red Sky Blood Golden Grass can help a high-level realm god break through a small realm and increase the chance of thirty percent, even if it is used to impact the peak realm god, it can also increase the chance of one percent. With so many Red Sky Blood Golden Grasses, there is no one whose strength is not impressed!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace and other supreme forces did not come to pick the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass here, which shows how terrifying the strength of the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass that has evolved into a superdimensional creature is.

However, those supreme forces are not helpless against that Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, if they do whatever it takes, they can definitely wipe out that Red Sky Blood Golden Grass superdimensional creature.

However, whether the price paid for harvesting and killing is cost-effective, if it is the fall of a few 3.2 peak realm gods who have fused with extradimensional things, it will not be cost-effective.

Any peak realm god who has fused extradimensional things, the combat power is not comparable to that of ordinary peak realm gods, and the loss of one is a huge loss.

And there is a high probability that these Red Sky Blood Golden Grass can cultivate dozens of peak realm gods, but these dozens of peak realm gods are at most five or six peak realm gods who fuse extradimensional things, and it will take a long time.

Moreover, if you really want to kill this extradimensional creature, the price you pay must be very large, maybe it will be enough to make a supreme force like Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace almost wipe out.

It is also because it is not cost-effective that those supreme forces did not come here, thinking that their strength will improve more in the future, so they will come here to pick the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass.

But now, Ye Tian is eyeing here.
